title: Custom Shields
description: A collection of unique shield textures for Minecraft
body:
**This pack requires OptiFine with Custom Item Textures (CIT) enabled.**

This resource pack adds seven unique shield designs that can be accessed by renaming your shield in an anvil:

- `black`
- `blue`
- `creeper`
- `dark_red`
- `mirror`
- `rabbit`
- `red`
- `navy_blue`

(Names are not case-sensitive.)

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49b914e4e33db97b436f6e21713a8ede7aacf623.png)

Some of the shields include subtle animations for a more dynamic look.

## Separate Non-CIT Versions

- [Black](https://modrinth.com/project/noire-shield)
- [Blue](https://modrinth.com/project/blue-shield)
- [Creeper](https://modrinth.com/project/creeper-shield)
- [Dark Red](https://modrinth.com/project/dark-red-shield)
- [Mirror](https://modrinth.com/project/mirror-shield)
- [Rabbit](https://modrinth.com/project/rabbit-shield)
- [Red](https://modrinth.com/project/red-shield)
- [Navy Blue](https://modrinth.com/project/navy-blue-shield)
